# Aura Knowledge

> Focused essays for humans, backed by compact agent-auditable research packets.

## Primary Pages
- [Home](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/)
- [Roadmap](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/roadmap/)
- [Evidence Canvas](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/evidence-canvas/)
- [Agent Entry](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/agents/)
- [Knowledge Graph](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/graph/)

## Articles
- [The Future of Publishing Is Agent-Auditable Research](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/agent-auditable-research/)
- [From Agent Swarms to Agent Control Planes](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/agent-control-planes/)
- [Agentic Commerce and the Product Truth Layer](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/agentic-commerce-product-truth/)
- [Agents: Goal-Directed AI Systems That Use Tools](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/agents/)
- [Beyond the First Conversation: Advanced Questions for New AI Agent Users](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/ai-agent-advanced-questions/)
- [You Do Not Need to Learn AI First: A 5-Minute Conversation Recipe](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/ai-agent-first-conversation/)
- [AI Delegation Orchestration: A Series on Durable Agent Work](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/ai-delegation-orchestration/)
- [From Conversation to Delegation: Why AI Work Needs a Durable Record](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/ai-delegation-orchestration-01-from-conversation-to-delegation/)
- [The Delegation Record: A Schema for Consequential AI Work](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/ai-delegation-orchestration-02-the-delegation-record/)
- [The Operator Cockpit Problem: Why More Traces Are Not Enough](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/ai-delegation-orchestration-03-the-operator-cockpit-problem/)
- [Control Loci, Not Human Managers: An Agent-Native Routing Model](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/ai-delegation-orchestration-04-control-loci-not-human-managers/)
- [Long-Running Delegations: How Agents Can Work for Hours Without Losing the Plot](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/ai-delegation-orchestration-05-long-running-delegations/)
- [Capability Contracts for Agent Networks](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/ai-delegation-orchestration-06-capability-contracts-for-agent-networks/)
- [Commitment Boundaries in High-Stakes Domains](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/ai-delegation-orchestration-07-commitment-boundaries-in-high-stakes-domains/)
- [AI, De-Mystified: A Field Guide to Modern AI Terminology](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/ai-demystified/)
- [Winters, Expert Systems, and the Cost of Overpromising Intelligence](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/ai-winters-expert-systems/)
- [Listening to the Firehose: Can Voice-First, Two-Way Audio Become a Legitimate Assistive Medium?](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/audio-first-voice-consumption/)
- [Before Machines: Calculation, Automata, and the Dream of Mechanical Reason](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/before-machines/)
- [The Birth of AI: Dartmouth, Symbolic Systems, and Early Optimism](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/birth-of-ai/)
- [Context Management: What the AI Sees Right Now](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/context-management/)
- [Designing for Substance: Platform Incentives and the Attention Economy](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/designing-for-substance/)
- [Evaluations: How We Know an AI Workflow Improved](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/evaluations/)
- [Fine-Tuning: Teaching a Model a Narrower Behavior](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/fine-tuning/)
- [From Formal Logic to Computation: The Mathematical Road to AI](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/formal-logic-to-computation/)
- [Foundation Models and the Return of General-Purpose AI Systems](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/foundation-models/)
- [The Human Road Through AI: Labor, Institutions, Governance, and Meaning](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/human-systems/)
- [Learning Machines: Statistics, Neural Networks, and the Data Turn](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/learning-machines/)
- [The Long Human Road to AI: A Reader’s Guide to Season 1](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/long-human-road-to-ai/)
- [Long-Running Sessions: Keeping AI Work Coherent Over Time](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/long-running-sessions/)
- [Loops vs Goals: The Difference Between Repetition and Direction in AI Agents](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/loops-vs-goals/)
- [Memory vs Context: What Should Survive the Conversation?](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/memory-vs-context/)
- [Multi-Agent Systems: When More Than One AI Worker Is Involved](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/multi-agent-systems/)
- [Planning and Reflection: How AI Breaks Down and Revises Work](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/planning-and-reflection/)
- [Prompt Caching: Reusing Stable Context](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/prompt-caching/)
- [Prompt Engineering: Instruction Design, Not Magic Words](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/prompt-engineering/)
- [Reasoning Models: Slower Thinking, Better Checks?](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/reasoning-models/)
- [Retrieval-Augmented Generation: Looking Things Up Before Answering](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/retrieval-augmented-generation/)
- [The Attention Extraction: How India's Digital Dividend Is Becoming a Cognitive Deficit](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/the-attention-extraction/)
- [The Generational Bet: Will India Build the AI Age or Scroll Through It?](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/the-generational-bet/)
- [The Substance Builder: How to Turn Dead Time into Small Acts of Creation](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/the-substance-builder/)
- [Tool Use: When the Model Calls Something Outside Itself](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/tool-use/)

- [Edges Feed JSONL](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/agents/feeds/edges.jsonl)

## Use
Use article packets as the retrieval unit. Treat maturity values as uncertainty markers. Prefer claim IDs and source IDs over inferred citations. Article artifacts use schemaVersion 3 with a provenance block (agents, reviews, policy) and typed evidence/counterevidence packets. Trust a published packet only when its provenance contains a human-approved review whose contentHash matches the current article.md hash.
